hypothesis: Incorporating transition-metal–centered descriptors (e.g., oxidation state, d-electron count, and spin state) as additional features in the ∆-learning model will substantially improve HSE06 band-gap predictions for MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) compared to the current ∆-learning model that uses RACs, APRDFs, and ST-135 alone, thereby reducing the MAE and increasing predictive reliability for open-shell systems.
